Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers 'defense technology industry development,' 'civil-military fusion,' and 'innovation,' with readings on China's techno-industrial drive, directly supporting Target 9.5 (scientific research, technological capabilities, innovation) and 9.b (domestic technology development).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course extensively covers the military's role in China's political system, national security, foreign policy decision-making, anti-corruption efforts, and the study of war and coercive strategies, directly aligning with Targets 16.1 (reduce violence), 16.5 (reduce corruption), and 16.6/16.7 (effective, accountable, and representative institutions).
